creator: jumper99@gmx.de
text:
Please re-open as the issue was not fixed.

[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$ for i in 31 32 33 34 35; do snmpwalk -v2c -cpublic 
localhost HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageDescr.${i}; snmpwalk -v2c -cpublic 
localhost HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageType.${i}; done
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageDescr.31 = STRING: /
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageType.31 = OID: 
HOST-RESOURCES-TYPES::hrStorageNetworkDisk
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageDescr.32 = STRING: /home
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageType.32 = OID: 
HOST-RESOURCES-TYPES::hrStorageNetworkDisk
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageDescr.33 = STRING: /usr
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageType.33 = OID: 
HOST-RESOURCES-TYPES::hrStorageNetworkDisk
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageDescr.34 = STRING: /tmp
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageType.34 = OID: 
HOST-RESOURCES-TYPES::hrStorageNetworkDisk
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageDescr.35 = STRING: /var
HOST-RESOURCES-MIB::hrStorageType.35 = OID: 
HOST-RESOURCES-TYPES::hrStorageNetworkDisk
[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$ pkg_info -Ex net-snmp
net-snmp-5.7_3
[helmut@BSDHelmut ~]$
